causalAutopsy.notes: Benchmark-Divergence Detector shipped with mirror population declared an operational pull step whose ownership was an explicit tracked residual, so no baseline was ever captured and every finding degraded to precondition-failed. Compounding it, the production model serving the highest-volume enrolled pair (gpt-5.4-mini via codex-cli) was absent from the fail-closed normalization table, so that pair resolved no-benched-baseline (unmapped) indefinitely. Surfaced 2026-07-23 while investigating why the drift comparator had produced nothing since it shipped.
